zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas William Baldewyne Sir於1330年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安時，他的父親Sir William Thomas Baldwin Baldewyne29歲，母親Lady Alice De Wigley20歲。他和Isabel Blakewell至少有2個兒子。他去世於1417年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas William Baldewyne Sir was born in 1330, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Thomas Baldwin Baldewyne, was 29 and his mother, Lady Alice De Wigley, was 20. He had at least 2 sons with Isabel Blakewell. He died in 1417, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas William Baldewyne Sir est né en 1330, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Thomas Baldwin Baldewyne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice De Wigley, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Isabel Blakewell. Il est décédé en 1417, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas William Baldewyne Sir(이)가 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Thomas Baldwin Baldewyne(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice De Wigley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Isabel Blakewell(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.
